description: Before submitting your manuscript, generate a clean BibTeX reference file from your Zotero library. Fix all quality issues for the 20 items tagged 'cite-in-paper', specifically addressing missing publication names and duplicate entries. Export the corrected items to /home/ga/Desktop/references.bib. The final BibTeX file must contain no duplicate entries and no items with missing journal fields.

empty_journal_titles: Algebraic Complexity Theory and Circuit Lower Bounds
